votes.rationale: Motion-0038 successfully polished the Claude bootstrap flow. Section extraction is cleaner, the generated bootstrap pack reads more naturally, and a package script now provides a convenient repo-level invocation path.

The motion stayed tightly scoped. It improved practical usability without redesigning the generator, drifting into provider features, or confusing generated bootstrap artifacts with canonical repo truth.

The implementation is coherent and operationally useful. The package script works, the generated markdown is cleaner, and the Claude bootstrap pack now feels like a practical repo-centric setup handoff rather than a rough proof artifact.
